---
title: ""

author:
- "**Ramon Gomes da Silva**"
- author2
- author3

date: "yyyy-mm-dd"

publication: "*Proceedings / Journal name*"

abstract: ""

categories:
- keyword1
- keyword2
- keyword3

toc: false

about:
  id: heading
  template: solana
  image: featured.png
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - text: DOI
      href: https://doi.org/
      target: _blank
    #- text: Slides
    #  href: "static/slides/"
    #  target: _blank
---

## Conference: Proceedings Name
## Journal: Journal Name
## Book: Book Name

::: {#heading}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Reference extracted from Zotero as Chicago Style

```bibtex

```

:::
